gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND T2.language = 'German'
pred_sql: SELECT fd.type FROM cards c JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE c.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND fd.language = 'German'
question: What's the German type of the card "Ancestor's Chosen"?
